title: Spicy Quick French Rice Canele
description: A spicy twist on traditional French rice Canele using brown rice and ferment-kimchi, ready in just 25 minutes.
instructions: Grease a 6-cup Canele mold with coconut oil and set aside.
Rinse the brown rice in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil and add the rice. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
In a small bowl, whisk together the salt, black pepper, and spicy sesame oil.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in the kimchi and sesame oil mixture.
Transfer the rice mixture to the prepared Canele mold and smooth the top.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
